final:
module divider (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [3:0] dividend,
    input [3:0] divisor,
    output reg [3:0] quotient,
    output reg [3:0] remainder
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            quotient <= 4'b0000;
            remainder <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (divisor != 4'b0000) begin
            quotient <= dividend / divisor;
            remainder <= dividend % divisor;
        end else begin
            quotient <= 4'b1111; // Max value for 4-bits
            remainder <= 4'b1111; // Max value for 4-bits
        end
    end
endmodule
